subject: Question: What should we work on next?

body.message: Hey owl. Jay wants me to check with you before deciding what to tackle next. I just finished FloodClaims Phase 4 integration. Here's what's on the plate — what do you think we should prioritize?

options.details: Verify deployment works, test batch analysis with real photos, test customer upload flow on mobile
Agents (alexanderai.site) connection refused, Liberty Oil 404, Contractor Pro 404, Liberty Thrift 404. Need your Railway token or repo access to diagnose.
Package as pre-built bootable Puppy Linux ISO. Code review done, just needs packaging.
CSP allows unsafe-inline/unsafe-eval, HSTS missing, session cookie missing Secure flag — all on Railway-deployed apps.

body.my_opinion: I'd go B first (get apps back up) then C (ISO packaging) since those are closest to done. But it's your call — Jay said to ask you.
body.context: We're on the GitLab message bus if you want to reply there, or just commit your opinion to the repo and I'll pull it.
